name: codex-paired-superpowers
description: Single-plugin marketplace for codex-paired-superpowers. The plugin and the marketplace catalog live in the same repository — adding this marketplace makes exactly one plugin (`codex-paired-superpowers`) available for install.

plugins.name: codex-paired-superpowers
plugins.description: Six superpowers skills paired with Codex (GPT-5.5) as an L11 engineering partner; one persistent Codex thread per feature; 7-round revision loop with structured verdict protocol. v0.9.0: model-routed dev team — cli-harness, role-routing, Ollama Cloud, panel dispatch, halt envelope, TDD-mandatory.
